title: 学生学习时长与成绩相关性分析
subtitle: 学习时长、暂停次数、快进次数 vs 章节测验分数
businessGoal: 判断哪些行为影响成绩最大

chapters.title: 相关性矩阵
chapters.content: 计算 duration / pauses / forwards vs 分数的相关系数并用热力图展示。

codeExamples.title: corr
codeExamples.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.read_csv('sample-duration-score.csv')
print(df.corr(numeric_only=True).round(2))
try:
    import seaborn as sns; import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(6,5))
    sns.heatmap(df.corr(numeric_only=True), annot=True, cmap='coolwarm', vmin=-1, vmax=1, ax=ax)
    plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()
except Exception as e:
    print('seaborn 不可用', e)

chapters.title: 散点图与线性回归
chapters.content: 用 np.polyfit(x, y, 1) 拟合一元线性模型并画图。

codeExamples.title: 回归
codeExamples.code:
import pandas as pd; import numpy as np; import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
df = pd.read_csv('sample-duration-score.csv')
x = df['duration_min'].values; y = df['quiz_score'].values
slope, intercept = np.polyfit(x, y, 1)
yh = slope * x + intercept
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(7,5))
ax.scatter(x, y, alpha=.4, s=8); ax.plot(x, yh, 'r', lw=2, label=f'score={slope:.2f}*duration+{intercept:.1f}')
ax.set_xlabel('学习时长'); ax.set_ylabel('测验分数'); ax.legend()
plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()
print('斜率=', round(slope,3), '; 截距=', round(intercept,2))

chapters.title: 箱线图分组对比
chapters.content: 用 qcut 把 duration 分三档，比较不同档位分数分布。

codeExamples.title: boxplot
codeExamples.code:
import pandas as pd; import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
df = pd.read_csv('sample-duration-score.csv')
df['duration_level'] = pd.qcut(df['duration_min'], 3, labels=['短','中','长'])
df.boxplot(column='quiz_score', by='duration_level', figsize=(7,5))
plt.title('学习时长分档 vs 测验分数'); plt.suptitle(''); plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()

exercises.prompt: 输出 pause_count、forward_count、quiz_score 的相关系数矩阵。
exercises.starterCode:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.read_csv('sample-duration-score.csv')

exercises.prompt: 绘制 duration_min 的直方图。
exercises.starterCode:
import pandas as pd; import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
df = pd.read_csv('sample-duration-score.csv')
exercises.sampleAnswer:
plt.hist(df['duration_min'], bins=30, edgecolor='black')
plt.xlabel('学习时长(分钟)'); plt.ylabel('人数'); plt.title('学习时长分布')
plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()

exercises.prompt: 以 pause_count 为 x, quiz_score 为 y 做散点+直线并输出斜率。
exercises.starterCode:
import pandas as pd; import numpy as np; import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
df = pd.read_csv('sample-duration-score.csv')
exercises.sampleAnswer:
x = df['pause_count'].values; y = df['quiz_score'].values
slope, intercept = np.polyfit(x, y, 1)
print('斜率=', round(slope,3), '; 截距=', round(intercept,2))
plt.scatter(x,y,s=6,alpha=.4); plt.plot(x, slope*x+intercept, 'r')
plt.xlabel('暂停次数'); plt.ylabel('分数'); plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()
